data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of preventing scalping.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to 'Prevent scalping', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps focus on booking and catalog visibility but do not address mechanisms or features specifically aimed at preventing scalping. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of features or mechanisms implemented to prevent scalping.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for scalping prevention mechanisms
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scalping prevention requirement.
